tasks.dependencies: Fetches the list of Promotions endpoints/accounts/vendors to map over

tasks.task_type: PythonOperator.expand (dynamic task mapping, exponential backoff retries)
tasks.dependencies: One mapped instance per endpoint; retry policy is error-code-aware
Aggregates success/failure/retry counts across mapped instances
Evaluates aggregate retry/error rate against a storm threshold
Branch: retry rate within normal bounds
Branch: retry storm detected, trips circuit breaker for downstream calls
Pages on-call, attaches AutoRCA retry-storm analysis
Loads Promotions target with successfully retrieved records

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_PRM_RETRY' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.description: Retry Storm incident on the Promotions pipeline (RTL_PRM_RETRY): marketing ad-platform API retry storm.
incident.symptoms: The Meta Ads API extraction task, dynamically mapped across 45 ad accounts, generated over 900 retries in a single run.
incident.root_cause: Meta throttled the account after a credential rotation left the OAuth token in a partially-refreshed state, returning 401s that the retry policy misclassified as transient and retried with fixed (non-exponential) 5-second backoff.
incident.business_impact: Marketing spend data delayed by 3 hours; retry volume also triggered a temporary Meta API rate-limit ban affecting other internal tools sharing the same app ID.
incident.resolution: Fix the token-refresh race condition; switch to exponential backoff with jitter and a circuit breaker that stops retrying on 401 (auth) errors after 2 attempts, escalating instead.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Meta throttled the account after a credential rotation left the OAuth token in a partially-refreshed state, returning 401s that the retry policy misclassified as transient and retried with fixed (non-exponential) 5-second backoff.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow task instance retry log shows fixed 5s intervals (no exponential growth) across all 900 attempts
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog external_api.retry_count for meta_ads_extract spiked to 900+, error_code breakdown shows 401 dominant
expected_rca.resolution: Fix the token-refresh race condition; switch to exponential backoff with jitter and a circuit breaker that stops retrying on 401 (auth) errors after 2 attempts, escalating instead.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add error-code-aware retry classification to the DAG factory's default retry policy: 5xx/timeout retry with backoff, 4xx auth errors fail-fast to AutoRCA.
